camera_language_presets.ecommerce_spin: Center frame, slow 180-degree orbit, white background, motion strength 2
camera_language_presets.ecommerce_reveal: Slow push-in from product base to label, clean shadow floor, 85mm macro
camera_language_presets.ugc_talking_head: Eye-level, subtle handheld feel, medium shot waist-up, natural indoor lighting
camera_language_presets.ugc_product_demo: Over-the-shoulder to product, gentle push-in, social review style
camera_language_presets.cinematic_hero: Low angle to eye-level crane shot, 24mm wide, slow dramatic reveal
camera_language_presets.cinematic_dolly: Side tracking dolly shot, subject moves through frame, 35mm lens
camera_language_presets.multi_shot_sequence: Establishing wide → medium action → close-up emotion, varied angles per shot

lighting_atmosphere_presets.ecommerce_clean: Soft overhead diffused light, pure white background, no shadows on product label
lighting_atmosphere_presets.ugc_indoor: Soft window daylight, subtle ring light catchlight, warm natural tone
lighting_atmosphere_presets.golden_hour: Warm orange sunlight, long shadows, lens flare, cinematic backlighting
lighting_atmosphere_presets.cyberpunk: Neon blue and magenta lights, rainy street, wet reflections, high saturation
lighting_atmosphere_presets.noir: High contrast black and white, dramatic shadows, moody lighting, smoke
lighting_atmosphere_presets.luxury_studio: Three-point lighting, dark gradient background, rim light on product edges
lighting_atmosphere_presets.dreamy: Soft focus, pastel colors, hazy atmosphere, glowing highlights

sound_design_presets.ecommerce_ambient: Subtle ambient drone, no distractions from product, clean electronic pad
sound_design_presets.ugc_vlog: Light upbeat lo-fi beat, background music stays below voice level
sound_design_presets.action: Fast-paced orchestral, heavy bass, synchronization with character hits
sound_design_presets.suspense: Low drone, heartbeat sound effect, sudden silence for tension
sound_design_presets.nature: Bird chirping, wind rustling leaves, gentle stream background
sound_design_presets.sci_fi: Electronic hum, robotic sounds, atmospheric synth pads
sound_design_presets.emotional_piano: Solo piano, slow tempo, minor key, crescendo at payoff moment
